store.faq.q1: What’s the difference between lifetime and subscription?
store.faq.a1: Lifetime is one-time purchase and self-managed API key. Subscription is monthly/yearly; we provide API service, no configuration needed.
store.faq.a2: Units for AI models; 10k tokens ≈ 7,500 Chinese characters. Consumption varies by model.
store.faq.a3: Lifetime supports 7-day no-questions refund. Subscription can be cancelled anytime with pro-rated refunds.

docs.section.writing.title: Writing Assistant

Convert LaTeX code to MathML in Word

Support complex formulas, matrices, piecewise functions
Table layout: centered formula, right-aligned numbering

docs.section.latex.sub.equation-numberin: Persistent storage, continues after Word restart
